caption: A man wearing a white button-down shirt, brown suspenders, a red bow tie, and a distinctive, tall, spiked grey wig appears in a room decorated with framed photos and clothing. He wears black headphones and glasses, and he is positioned in front of a black microphone. A logo on the bottom left of the screen reads "THE TALK BOX PODCAST" with a microphone icon. To the right, another logo says "GOSS TALK JOY" with a microphone icon. In the first frame, the man looks forward and gestures with his right hand. In the second frame, he remains in a similar position but his mouth is slightly open. By the third frame, he has tilted his head downward and closed his eyes. In the final frame, he looks slightly down and to the side with a neutral facial expression.
